subcodes.first_line: The Self-Subsisting One hath indeed come, and sovereignty belongeth unto God, Lord of all that was and all that shall be. We were indeed seated upon the throne [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی القیوم و الملک لله مالک ما کان و ما یکون انا کنا مستویا علی کرسی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @empty learning; false spirituality, @service to others; to the Cause of God
